LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PANOCHE ENERGY CENTER, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING FILING OF PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD UNDER SEAL WILL BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE GOLDSMITH IN DEPARTMENT 613. PLEASE MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT HIS CLERK AT (415) 551-3840 REGARDING A NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Hearing Panoche Energy Center Llc Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Permitting Filing Of Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award Under Seal
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PANOCHE ENERGY CENTER, LLC's Motion For Order Permitting Filing Of Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award Under Seal will be heard before Judge Goldsmith in Department 613. Please meet and confer and contact his clerk at (415) 551-3840 regarding a new hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Hearing On Panoche Energy Center, Llc'S Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PANOCHE ENERGY CENTER, LLC's Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award will be heard before Judge Goldsmith in Department 613. Please meet and confer and contact his clerk at (415) 551-3840 regarding a new hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
